prompt: In the context of structure-based drug design, design a high-affinity protein binder targeting Abrin-a (plant toxin (ribosome-inactivating protein type II, select agent)) expressed by Abrus precatorius. The binder should achieve picomolar binding. provide a approach for: (1) initial binder scaffold selection using ColabFold, (2) interface design and optimization, (3) specificity profiling. Include relevant computational tools and databases to use.
source_citation: Derived from uniprot (2024_05); target: Abrin-a; organism: Abrus precatorius; catalogue version v1.0
